things.name: Bob Marley Museum
things.description: The reggae legend's former home and recording studio - Nine Mile pilgrimage to his birthplace

things.description: National landmark mansion with Jamaica's most famous ice cream

things.description: Tour of the UNESCO World Heritage Blue Mountains with the world's most expensive coffee

things.description: Caribbean's finest collection of Caribbean art including Bob Marley and Edna Manley

things.name: Port Royal

things.description: Ocean Boulevard waterfront promenade with the Bank of Jamaica money museum

things.description: Birthplace of reggae and Bob Marley - guided tours of the government yard immortalised in song

things.name: Jamaica National Heritage Sites Walk
things.description: Gordon House, Headquarters House and other Georgian colonial buildings

things.name: Hellshire Beach & Fried Fish
things.description: Local beach south of Kingston with the best fried fish and festival (fried dumplings)

things.name: Emancipation Park
things.description: Modern park with the striking Redemption Song bronze sculpture by Laura Facey
